subject_tmpl: Rats coming from vacant lot on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi, I've been seeing rats in my backyard for about {DAYS} days now and I'm pretty sure they're coming from the vacant lot next to {ADDRESS}. There are old tires and what looks like garbage dumped there. I have two kids and I'm worried. Can someone from the village please inspect that lot? My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm at {PHONE} if you need to reach me.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for contacting us, {FIRST}. I've opened a rodent complaint (case {CASE}) for the vacant lot near {ADDRESS}. A health inspector will visit within 5 business days. Please call {PHONE} if you observe any additional activity in the meantime.

subject_tmpl: Raccoon in my attic — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here at {ADDRESS}. There is a raccoon that has gotten into my attic. I can hear it at night and I'm worried it may have young with it. I've called a private trapper but they said I should also notify the village. Is there anything the health department can do or any resources you can point me to? Please email me back or call {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Standing water / mosquitoes at {STREET} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: I wanted to report standing water that has been sitting at the corner of {STREET} and {CROSS} since {DATE}. It's a low spot and every rain fills it back up. With mosquito season here I'm concerned about breeding. My neighbor's kids play near there. Can Public Works or the health department take a look? — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hello {NAME}, thank you for the report. I'm forwarding this to Public Works for a drainage assessment and will follow up on the mosquito abatement side. We appreciate your attention to this.

subject_tmpl: Sewage smell near {ADDRESS} — please investigate
body_tmpl: There is a very strong sewage odor coming from the area around {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. It started about {DAYS} days ago and is worse in the morning. I don't know if it's a broken sewer line or what, but it's bad enough that we can't open our windows. This needs to be looked at right away. My name is {FIRST} {LAST}.

subject_tmpl: Food safety concern — {BIZ} on St. Charles Rd
body_tmpl: I'm writing to report a food safety problem at {BIZ} located on St. Charles Rd. On {DATE} I noticed employees handling food without gloves and what looked like a pest issue near the prep area. I got sick after eating there and I don't want this to happen to someone else. Can the health department do a surprise inspection? My name is {FIRST} {LAST}.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for bringing this to our attention, {FIRST}. Your complaint has been logged and a health inspector will conduct an unannounced inspection of {BIZ} within 72 hours. We will not disclose your identity to the establishment.

subject_tmpl: Overflowing dumpster attracting rats — {STREET}
body_tmpl: The commercial dumpster behind the building at {ADDRESS} has been overflowing for at least a week and is clearly drawing rats. I've seen them at night. This is directly across the alley from my house. Who is responsible for making sure that dumpster gets emptied? I'd appreciate a quick response. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Mayor — rat problem getting out of hand on {STREET}
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I'm a longtime Bellwood resident on {STREET} and I need your help. The rat situation on our block has gotten completely out of control. I've called the health department {NUM} times over the past {DAYS} days and nothing has changed. There is a pile of construction debris at {ADDRESS} that seems to be the source. Please intervene. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for reaching out directly. I've asked our health officer to personally follow up on case {CASE} and I've contacted code enforcement regarding the debris at {ADDRESS}. You'll hear from my office by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Referral: standing water / mosquito breeding — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Frank, I'm forwarding a resident complaint regarding persistent standing water at {ADDRESS} near {STREET} and {CROSS}. The resident reports this has been pooling after every rain since {DATE}. Given peak mosquito season, I'd like to get abatement tablets down as soon as possible, but this really needs a drainage fix first. Can your crew assess? I'll coordinate on the public health side once I hear from you.
reply_tmpl: Priya — got it. I'll send someone out to {ADDRESS} by end of week. If it's a grade issue we may need engineering. I'll loop in Tom if so.

subject_tmpl: Vacant lot — rodent harborage, needs code action — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Sandra, I inspected the vacant lot at {ADDRESS} on {DATE} and found significant rodent harborage: debris piles, discarded tires, and active burrows along the fence line. Health has issued a notice to the property owner of record but we need a code violation opened simultaneously to get traction. Can you open a case and post the property? I have photos if needed.

subject_tmpl: Dead animal smell near {STREET} — possible rodent infestation
body_tmpl: There's been a terrible dead animal smell around {ADDRESS} for about {DAYS} days. I think something died in the walls or under the porch of the vacant house next door. I've also been seeing rats in the alley. Can the health department check this out? I'm worried about disease. My name is {NAME} and I'm at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hello {NAME}, we've opened a complaint and a health inspector will contact you within 2 business days to arrange an inspection of the property near {ADDRESS}. Thank you for reporting this.

subject_tmpl: Requesting pest inspection — {BIZ}, {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: This is {FIRST} {LAST}, owner of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. We've noticed what appear to be mouse droppings in our storage area and want to get ahead of any problem before our next routine inspection. Could a health inspector visit and advise us? We want to be fully compliant. Best time to reach us is {TIME} at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Mosquito problem — standing water in neighbor's yard — {STREET}
body_tmpl: My neighbor at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} has old buckets, a kiddie pool, and a clogged gutter that are all full of standing water. The mosquitoes are terrible this summer. I've spoken to them and they won't clean it up. Is there something the village can do? I have young children. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I've created a nuisance complaint and will schedule an inspection of {ADDRESS} within 5 business days. If standing water is confirmed, we will issue a notice requiring abatement within 48 hours.

subject_tmpl: Sewer gas / rotten egg smell — {STREET} near {CROSS}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} {LAST} here — I live at {ADDRESS}. For the last {DAYS} mornings there has been a strong sewer gas or rotten egg odor in the area of {STREET} near {CROSS}. It's bad enough to make you feel sick. I'm wondering if there's a cracked main or a manhole issue. Please send someone to investigate. My phone is {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Restaurant concern — {BIZ} — possible health violation
body_tmpl: I ate at {BIZ} on {DATE} and noticed a cockroach on the wall near our table. I also saw what looked like mold on the soda dispenser nozzles. This is unacceptable. I'm not trying to hurt the business but people's health is at risk. Please do an inspection. I am {NAME} and can be reached at {PHONE} if you need my statement.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for your report. An unannounced inspection of {BIZ} will be conducted within 72 hours. Results of health inspections are public record and will be available on the Village website.

subject_tmpl: Raccoon family living under our deck — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: We have what appears to be a mother raccoon and at least {NUM} young living under our deck at {ADDRESS}. I know raccoons can carry rabies and distemper and I'm nervous with our dog. What can we do? Does Bellwood have any animal control resources or can the health department advise? I don't want to harm them but I need them gone. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, Bellwood contracts with Cook County Animal Control for wildlife concerns. I'd recommend calling them at their main number as a first step. Our health office can also refer you to licensed nuisance wildlife trappers. Please call us at Village Hall if you'd like that list.

subject_tmpl: Update: rodent abatement program status — {DATE}
body_tmpl: Karen, wanted to give you a quick update heading into the warm months. We've baited {NUM} properties so far this season and have {NUM} open complaints under investigation. The vacant lot at {ADDRESS} is our biggest active harborage concern — code has been notified and a hearing is scheduled. I'd recommend we request mosquito abatement spray from the county for the week of {DATE}. Let me know if you want a full briefing.

subject_tmpl: Pigeon infestation and health hazard — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: The abandoned commercial building at {ADDRESS} has hundreds of pigeons roosting in it. There is droppings all over the sidewalk and alley. I've read that pigeon droppings can cause serious lung disease. This building has been vacant for over {DAYS} days. Someone needs to do something. Please advise — {FIRST} {LAST}, resident of {STREET}.

subject_tmpl: Sewage backup odor — our block has been suffering for {DAYS} days
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo — my name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I live at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. For {DAYS} days there has been a sewage smell so bad we cannot sit outside or open windows. We have called Public Works twice and no one has come. I'm asking you directly to please make this a priority. We pay our taxes and deserve better. You can reach me at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I'm sorry you and your neighbors have been experiencing this. I've personally contacted the Public Works director and confirmed a crew will be dispatched to {ADDRESS} by {DATE}. My office will follow up with you directly.

subject_tmpl: Rats coming into our building from neighboring vacant lot
body_tmpl: This is {FIRST} {LAST} from {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. We've been finding rat droppings in our back storage room and believe they are entering from the vacant lot at {CROSS}. We have our own pest control but as long as that lot is unaddressed it's a losing battle. Can the village take action on that lot? We'd appreciate your help.
reply_tmpl: Thank you for contacting us. I've opened a rodent complaint (case {CASE}) for the vacant lot at {CROSS}. An inspector will visit this week and the property owner will be notified. We'll also note the entry point concern you raised.

subject_tmpl: Stray cats everywhere — possible health concern — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hi there. I'm {FIRST} {LAST} on {STREET}. There is a feral cat colony that has grown to what looks like {NUM} cats near {ADDRESS}. I understand some folks feed them, but the smell and the rodents they attract (dead mice/birds) are becoming a real nuisance and possible health issue. Is there a TNR program or any village resource that can help?
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, Bellwood supports a Trap-Neuter-Return program administered in partnership with the county. I can connect you with the coordinator. We'll also look into the feeding activity at {ADDRESS} as there may be a nuisance ordinance concern.

subject_tmpl: FYI — suspected illegal dumping / health hazard at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: Priya, patrol flagged a large pile of construction waste and apparent household garbage dumped at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} overnight. Officers documented it at {TIME} on {DATE}. There are bags of what look like food waste mixed in which could draw rodents quickly. Wanted to give you a heads-up so health can assess alongside any code action. Report # {CASE}.

subject_tmpl: Possible West Nile risk — neglected pool at {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: The house at {ADDRESS} has an above-ground pool that has been green and stagnant all summer. I've seen mosquito larvae in it when I walked by. With West Nile virus concerns I think this needs immediate attention from the health department. The owners don't seem to be maintaining the property at all. My name is {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you for reporting this. Stagnant pools are a priority concern during mosquito season. A health inspector will visit {ADDRESS} within 48 hours and we will contact the property owner to require immediate treatment or drainage.

subject_tmpl: Hoarder situation next door — rat concern — {STREET}
body_tmpl: I don't want to get my neighbor in trouble but the situation at {ADDRESS} has reached a breaking point. There is stuff stacked outside all around the house — bags, old furniture, food containers. I've seen multiple rats going in and out for weeks. This is on {STREET} near {CROSS}. Something needs to be done for the whole block's sake. — {NAME}

subject_tmpl: Sewage smell from basement drain — village sewer issue?
body_tmpl: We've been getting a sewage smell through our basement floor drain at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. Our plumber checked our system and says everything is fine on our end and suspects it's a village sewer pressure or blockage issue. This has been happening for {DAYS} days, usually in the morning. Can someone from the village come inspect the main? — {FIRST} {LAST}, {PHONE}
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}, I'm forwarding this to Public Works for a sewer main inspection. Basement drain odor can sometimes indicate a main blockage or low-water trap issue. Someone will follow up with you within 2 business days.

subject_tmpl: Complaint against neighboring restaurant — rodent and odor issue
body_tmpl: We are writing on behalf of {BIZ} at {ADDRESS}. The restaurant next door appears to have a serious rat problem — we see them along the shared wall at night — and the grease trap smell is overpowering on warm days. We've tried to raise this with the neighboring owner with no success. We respectfully request a health inspection of the neighboring establishment. Thank you — {FIRST} {LAST}, Manager

subject_tmpl: Catch basin on {STREET} backed up — mosquito / odor problem
body_tmpl: The catch basin at {STREET} and {CROSS} has been backed up since {DATE}. There's a pool of standing water with an oily sheen and now it smells. Mosquitoes are bad around there. I thought Public Works should know. Can it get cleared out? — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, I've added this catch basin to our inspection route for this week. We appreciate the heads-up.

subject_tmpl: Illness after eating at {BIZ} — please inspect
body_tmpl: Hello, I'm {FIRST} {LAST} and I'm reporting a possible foodborne illness. I ate at {BIZ} on {DATE} and became ill approximately {DAYS} hours later with vomiting and stomach cramps. I've since heard from {NUM} other people who ate there that same day and had the same experience. I think there needs to be an immediate inspection. I am happy to provide details at {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I'm sorry to hear you were ill. This is being treated as a potential foodborne illness cluster. A health inspector will conduct an immediate unannounced inspection of {BIZ}. I may need to follow up with you for additional information — please keep your contact info handy.

subject_tmpl: License hold request — {BIZ} — pending health inspection outcome
body_tmpl: Yolanda, I need to flag {BIZ} at {ADDRESS} for a license review hold. We received a foodborne illness complaint (case {CASE}) and are conducting an unannounced inspection on {DATE}. Please do not process any license renewals for this establishment until I provide clearance. I'll update you by end of week. Thanks — Priya
reply_tmpl: Got it, Priya. I've flagged {BIZ} in the system. I'll hold any renewal action pending your clearance. Let me know what you find.

subject_tmpl: Opossum living under abandoned garage — {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: There is an opossum (possibly more than one) living under the detached garage at the abandoned property at {ADDRESS}. The garage looks like it's falling apart too. I'm not sure if opossums are dangerous but the property has been empty for {DAYS} days and nobody is managing it. Can the village do anything? My name is {FIRST} and I'm at {PHONE}.

subject_tmpl: Neighbor composting improperly — attracting pests — {STREET}
body_tmpl: My neighbor at {ADDRESS} has a compost pile that is not covered and is right along my fence line on {STREET}. It smells terrible and I've seen rats around it. I compost myself so I understand the idea, but this pile has meat scraps in it and is clearly out of control. Is there a health ordinance about this? — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hello {NAME}, thank you for contacting us. There are village guidelines on compost management. I'll have a health officer inspect the property at {ADDRESS} and advise the resident on proper practices. If it constitutes a nuisance, a notice will be issued.

subject_tmpl: Mosquito spray request for our block — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Is there any village or county mosquito spraying program we can request for our block? We live on {STREET} between {CROSS} and {ADDRESS} and this summer has been terrible. There's a low area in the park nearby that holds water and I believe it's breeding ground. Please let us know if this is something you can help with or who we should contact. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Hi {FIRST}, Bellwood participates in the Cook County Mosquito Abatement District program. I can submit a spray request for your area and will also flag the low spot in the park for treatment. Expect a response within 5-7 business days from the county.

subject_tmpl: Grease/sewage smell near {STREET} — coming from restaurant alley
body_tmpl: The alley behind the restaurants on {STREET} near {CROSS} smells absolutely horrible — grease, sewage, garbage all mixed together. On hot days it is unbearable. I walk past there every day going to the Metra station. Can someone check whether the grease traps are being serviced and whether there is a drain issue? I've dealt with this for {DAYS} days. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Suspicious mold smell in common area — {ADDRESS} apartment
body_tmpl: I am a tenant at {ADDRESS} on {STREET}. The hallways and laundry room have a very strong mold/mildew smell and I can see black spots on the ceiling near a water stain. The landlord has not responded to my {NUM} complaints over the past {DAYS} days. I have a child with asthma. Does the village health department handle habitability complaints? — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, habitability complaints including mold are within our purview. I've opened case {CASE} and a housing inspector will contact you within 3 business days to arrange an inspection. Please document the conditions with photos in the meantime.

subject_tmpl: Thank you — rat problem on {STREET} has improved
body_tmpl: I just wanted to send a quick thank-you. After I reported the rat problem near {ADDRESS} back in {DATE}, someone came out and baited the area and made the property owner clean up the lot. I have not seen a single rat in {DAYS} days. That's a huge improvement. Please pass my thanks along to whoever handled this. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, thank you so much for following up — this is exactly the kind of feedback that motivates our team. We're glad the situation has improved. Don't hesitate to reach out if anything changes.

subject_tmpl: Skunk living under front porch — {ADDRESS} — need guidance
body_tmpl: We have a skunk that has taken up residence under our front porch at {ADDRESS}. I know it's a nuisance animal issue but I wanted to check with the village first before I do anything. I have a dog and I don't want to risk a rabies exposure or a spraying incident handled the wrong way. Any advice on how to handle this safely? — {NAME}, {PHONE}

subject_tmpl: Drainage issue contributing to mosquito breeding — {STREET} and {CROSS}
body_tmpl: Tom, I have an active mosquito abatement complaint at {STREET} and {CROSS} that keeps coming back because the underlying drainage issue isn't resolved. I can keep treating but it won't stick. Residents have complained multiple times this season. Can you assess whether this is a grade issue or a blocked inlet and estimate what a fix would cost? I want to bring a proposal to Karen.
reply_tmpl: Priya, I'll get out there this week. I've had my eye on that intersection anyway. If it's a simple inlet issue Public Works can do it; if it's a grade problem we'd need to program it. Will send you my assessment by {DATE}.

subject_tmpl: Rodent droppings in shared laundry — apartment on {STREET}
body_tmpl: I live at {ADDRESS} on {STREET} and found rodent droppings in the shared laundry room this morning. This is in the {NUM}-unit building managed by a company I've had trouble reaching. I'm concerned for my family's health. What can the village do about a landlord who won't address pest problems in a rental building? — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, landlords in Bellwood are responsible for pest-free common areas. I've opened complaint {CASE} and will conduct an inspection of {ADDRESS} within 5 days. If violations are confirmed, the property owner will face a notice and potential fines. Thank you for reporting.

subject_tmpl: Request for information — village rodent control resources
body_tmpl: Hello — my name is {FIRST} {LAST}. I live at {ADDRESS} and have been seeing signs of mice inside my house. I'd like to know what resources the village provides for rodent control, if any. Do you have free traps or bait available? Is there a program I can sign up for? Any help would be appreciated. My phone is {PHONE}.
reply_tmpl: Hello {FIRST}! The village does provide free rodent bait stations to residents on request — supply is limited but we should have some available. Please stop by Village Hall at 3200 Washington Blvd or call us to arrange pickup. We can also inspect your property to identify entry points at no charge.

subject_tmpl: Garbage piling up at {ADDRESS} — smell / rats
body_tmpl: The property at {ADDRESS} has had garbage bags piled up outside for {DAYS} days. The bags are split, there is visible rotting food, and I've seen rats going through it every night. The smell is bad and we live right next door. Please help. I can send photos. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Follow-up on case {CASE} — raccoon still present
body_tmpl: I filed a complaint ({CASE}) about a raccoon in my attic on {DATE}. I was told an inspector would follow up but I have not heard from anyone in {DAYS} days and the animal is still there. In fact it sounds like there may be more now. Can someone please contact me at {PHONE}? I need this resolved. — {FIRST} {LAST}, {ADDRESS}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, I sincerely apologize for the delay on case {CASE}. I am personally assigning this to a health officer today and you will receive a call by {TIME} tomorrow. Thank you for your patience.

subject_tmpl: Standing water in park low area — mosquito issue — {STREET}
body_tmpl: Hello, the low area in the park near {STREET} and {CROSS} holds water for days after rain and this summer the mosquitoes there are terrible. My kids can't play outside without getting eaten alive. I know Public Works sometimes dresses those areas with mosquito dunks — can that happen here? — {NAME}
reply_tmpl: Hi {NAME}, we're aware of that low spot. I've requested mosquito dunks placement from our parks team and will follow up with the county abatement district for aerial treatment in that zone. Thanks for reporting.

subject_tmpl: Sewage smell at Metra station underpass — {DATE}
body_tmpl: Hi — I ride the Metra UP-W line every morning and the underpass near the station has had a horrible sewage smell for the past {DAYS} days. I don't know if it's a sewer line issue or something else but it's really unpleasant. Is this a village issue or Metra's? I just want to make sure someone knows about it. — {FIRST} {LAST}

subject_tmpl: Sewer odor complaint — {ADDRESS} — investigate main?
body_tmpl: Frank, I have {NUM} separate resident complaints about sewage odor in the {STREET} / {CROSS} area over the past {DAYS} days. Our review doesn't point to any private property issue. Can you have your crew camera the main in that block? The complaints cluster around {ADDRESS} area. I want to rule out a cracked main or blockage before I advise residents further.
reply_tmpl: Priya, I'll get a camera crew scheduled for {DATE}. That section of main is older so it's worth a look. I'll share the report once we have results.

subject_tmpl: Multiple rats seen in alley — {STREET} between {CROSS} and {ADDRESS}
body_tmpl: {FIRST} here at {ADDRESS}. Last {DATE} evening I counted at least {NUM} rats in the alley between {STREET} and {CROSS}. They were bold — running around in plain sight. I believe the commercial recycling bin at the end of the alley is the draw. This is a family neighborhood and this is really alarming. Please send an inspector and consider additional baiting.

subject_tmpl: Thank you Mayor — mosquito situation on our block is better
body_tmpl: Mayor Okonkwo, I just wanted to say thank you. After I wrote to you about the standing water and mosquito problem on {STREET}, the county came and sprayed and Public Works fixed the low spot. We can actually sit on our porch again this summer. I know these things take coordination and I appreciate that someone listened. — {FIRST} {LAST}
reply_tmpl: Dear {FIRST}, hearing this makes my day. I'll pass your kind words along to Public Works and our health department — they do this work every day without much recognition and it means a lot. Enjoy your porch!
